audience: founder · brain · worker · internal agents only
one_law: Phase 0 = $0 reference surfaces that attract users · honest mock/trial/freemium · platform-neutral · one product lane each · Phase 2 paid only after founder approval.

phase_0_definition.goal: Turn every sandbox, trial, and freemium surface into a reference implementation that attracts users before paid conversion.
phase_0_definition.scope: Internal policy — shapes plan upgrades, catalog copy, and hub slices; not public law prose until SAVE TO doc.
phase_0_definition.pairs_with: tool_pick phase_1_free exhaust · WTM product lane routing

reference_ladder.label: Mock sandbox
reference_ladder.honesty: mock_only label required · no fake live claims

reference_ladder.label: Live trial
reference_ladder.honesty: time-boxed · disclosure T0/T1 · no brain internals

reference_ladder.label: Paid / Phase 2
reference_ladder.honesty: founder approval receipt before wire · NO-CC until gate

every_surface_must: platform_neutral copy — any stack · any surface
one product lane (Noetfield · TrustField · SourceA Forge · WitnessBC)
demo or trial path ≤ 30s to value
disk receipt or catalog status field — no chat-only claims
forbidden: generic SaaS blob without lane routing
